_doc: Sample data-driven spawn profile for the jungle petshop's tropical bird cage. Profile JSONs are OPTIONAL — when absent, the CTOV compat layer falls back to the CTOV semantic tag (domesticationinnovation:petshop/ctov_jungle/petshop_cage_3) and then to the DI base tag (domesticationinnovation:petstore_cage_3). When present, the profile's 'entries' array takes precedence over the DI fallback (but NOT over the CTOV semantic tag). Use 'ctov_tag' / 'di_fallback_tag' to override the tag IDs used at runtime. Each entry supports: entity (required), weight (int, default 1), baby (bool, optional), age (int, optional, may be negative — e.g. -60000 for a permanent baby that will never age up).
